tasks.subject: Task 0: Add normalize_code helper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure function that normalizes an improved_code string so reindentation and whitespace variation don't affect the dedup hash while token differences still do.

**Files:**
- Modify: pr_agent/algo/inline_comments_dedup.py
- Test: tests/unittest/test_inline_comments_dedup.py (new class TestNormalizeCode)

**Verify:** uv run pytest tests/unittest/test_inline_comments_dedup.py::TestNormalizeCode -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pr_agent/algo/inline_comments_dedup.py", "tests/unittest/test_inline_comments_dedup.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/unittest/test_inline_comments_dedup.py::TestNormalizeCode -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Empty/None/whitespace-only input returns empty string", "Reindented blocks produce identical output", "Trailing whitespace stripped", "Internal whitespace runs collapsed", "Leading/trailing blank lines dropped", "Tabs expand consistently", "Token differences preserved", "Is idempotent"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Rewrite generate_marker with v2s/v2p namespaces
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Emit structured (v2s) hash when improved_code is present; prose (v2p) fallback otherwise. Single marker per comment. Preserve line-drift stability.

**Files:**
- Modify: pr_agent/algo/inline_comments_dedup.py (rewrite generate_marker, add _SEP + version tags + design-decision code comment)
- Test: tests/unittest/test_inline_comments_dedup.py (new class TestGenerateMarkerStructured)

**Verify:** uv run pytest tests/unittest/test_inline_comments_dedup.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pr_agent/algo/inline_comments_dedup.py", "tests/unittest/test_inline_comments_dedup.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/unittest/test_inline_comments_dedup.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Paraphrased prose same edit collides", "Same prose different edit splits", "Reindented edit collides", "Label change doesn't split when structured", "Empty improved_code falls back to prose", "Missing fields return None correctly per namespace", "v2s and v2p preimage-distinct", "Existing line-drift test still passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Integration test for live cleanup_mode scenario
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Lock in end-to-end behaviour: two paraphrased suggestions with identical improved_code route through update path, not create path.

**Files:**
- Test: tests/unittest/test_github_inline_dedup.py (add TestStructuredHashLivePath)

**Verify:** uv run pytest tests/unittest/test_github_inline_dedup.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/unittest/test_github_inline_dedup.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/unittest/test_github_inline_dedup.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Paraphrased-prose identical improved_code routes to edit_review_comment", "create_review not called", "Test regression-proofs the structured-hash behaviour"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Documentation updates for improve.md
tasks.description:
**Goal:** User-facing docs reflect the structured-first rule, strict-(a) behaviour, and invariants.

**Files:**
- Modify: docs/docs/tools/improve.md

**Verify:** Visual review of rendered docs.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/docs/tools/improve.md"], "verifyCommand": "", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Config row updated with structured-first language", "New How inline-comment deduplication works section present", "Strict-(a) behaviour explicitly stated", "Invariants (paraphrase, reindent, line drift) documented", "Future work note included"]}
```
